---
title: "Hovmoller - All Months"
output: html_document
---

# Libraries

```{r}

# Libraries
library(terra)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)

# Collect ALL files (Removed the .08 restriction)
ndvi_files <- list.files("Data/Senegal/Vegetation/NDVI", pattern = "\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE)

# Create an empty list to hold results
hov_data_list_senegal <- list()

for (file in ndvi_files) {
  # Extract year and month based on standard naming (e.g., NDVI.h16.2001.08.tif)
  # This grabs the 4 digits before the dot, and the 2 digits after
  year <- as.numeric(sub(".*(\\d{4})\\.(\\d{2})\\.tif$", "\\1", basename(file)))
  month <- as.numeric(sub(".*(\\d{4})\\.(\\d{2})\\.tif$", "\\2", basename(file)))
  
  # Create a proper Date object for plotting (Defaulting to the 1st of the month)
  date_val <- as.Date(paste(year, month, "01", sep = "-"))
  
  # Create a continuous fractional year for our speed-of-expansion math
  frac_year <- year + (month - 1) / 12 
  
  # Load the raster
  r <- rast(file)
  
  # Convert the spatial map into a massive raw dataframe (X, Y, Value)
  df <- as.data.frame(r, xy = TRUE)
  colnames(df)[3] <- "NDVI"
  
  df$Lat_Deg <- df$y / 111319.5
  
  # Round the Y coordinate (Latitude) for clean horizontal "slices"
  row_means <- df %>%
      mutate(Latitude_Slice = round(Lat_Deg, 1)) %>% 
      group_by(Latitude_Slice) %>%
      summarize(Mean_NDVI = mean(NDVI, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      mutate(Year = year, Month = month, Date = date_val, Frac_Year = frac_year)
  
  # Save this month's slice data into list
  hov_data_list_senegal[[basename(file)]] <- row_means
  print(paste("Processed Date:", date_val))
}

# Master dataframe
master_hov_df_senegal <- bind_rows(hov_data_list_senegal)

# Create diagram (Now using Date on the X axis)
p_hov_senegal <- ggplot(master_hov_df_senegal, aes(x = Date, y = Latitude_Slice)) +
  geom_raster(aes(fill = Mean_NDVI)) + 
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c(
    "#8c510a", # Brown (Desert)
    "#f6e8c3", # Cream (Dry Transition)
    "#78c679", # Light Green (Grassland)
    "#00441b"  # Dark Green (Lush)
  ),
  oob = scales::squish,
  limits = c(0, 0.8), 
  name = "Mean NDVI"
  ) +
  geom_contour(aes(z = Mean_NDVI), breaks = 0.2, color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_contour(aes(z = Mean_NDVI), breaks = 0.45, color = "darkblue",linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = "Sahara Seasonal Pulse & Expansion in Senegal (All Months)",
    subtitle = "Red Line = Desert Boundary (<0.2) | Blue Dashed = Lush Zone (>0.45)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Latitude (°N)"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "3 years", date_labels = "%Y", expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

p_hov_senegal

# Collect ALL files
ndvi_files <- list.files("Data/Chad/Vegetation/NDVI", pattern = "\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE)

# Create an empty list to hold results
hov_data_list_chad <- list()

for (file in ndvi_files) {
  year <- as.numeric(sub(".*(\\d{4})\\.(\\d{2})\\.tif$", "\\1", basename(file)))
  month <- as.numeric(sub(".*(\\d{4})\\.(\\d{2})\\.tif$", "\\2", basename(file)))
  date_val <- as.Date(paste(year, month, "01", sep = "-"))
  frac_year <- year + (month - 1) / 12 
  
  # Load the raster
  r <- rast(file)
  
  # Convert the spatial map into a massive raw dataframe (X, Y, Value)
  df <- as.data.frame(r, xy = TRUE)
  colnames(df)[3] <- "NDVI"
  
  df$Lat_Deg <- df$y / 111319.5
  
  row_means <- df %>%
      mutate(Latitude_Slice = round(Lat_Deg, 1)) %>% 
      group_by(Latitude_Slice) %>%
      summarize(Mean_NDVI = mean(NDVI, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      mutate(Year = year, Month = month, Date = date_val, Frac_Year = frac_year)
  
  # Save this month's slice data into list
  hov_data_list_chad[[basename(file)]] <- row_means
  print(paste("Processed Date:", date_val))
}

# Master dataframe
master_hov_df_chad <- bind_rows(hov_data_list_chad)

# Create diagram
p_hov_chad <- ggplot(master_hov_df_chad, aes(x = Date, y = Latitude_Slice)) +
  geom_raster(aes(fill = Mean_NDVI)) + 
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c(
    "#8c510a", # Brown (Desert)
    "#f6e8c3", # Cream (Dry Transition)
    "#78c679", # Light Green (Grassland)
    "#00441b"  # Dark Green (Lush)
  ),
  oob = scales::squish,
  limits = c(0, 0.8), 
  name = "Mean NDVI"
  ) +
  geom_contour(aes(z = Mean_NDVI), breaks = 0.2, color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_contour(aes(z = Mean_NDVI), breaks = 0.45, color = "darkblue",linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = "Sahara Seasonal Pulse & Expansion in Chad (All Months)",
    subtitle = "Red Line = Desert Boundary (<0.2) | Blue Dashed = Lush Zone (>0.45)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Latitude (°N)"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "3 years", date_labels = "%Y", expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

p_hov_chad

# Combine hovmoller data
senegal_final <- master_hov_df_senegal %>% mutate(Region = "Senegal")
chad_final    <- master_hov_df_chad %>% mutate(Region = "Chad")

combined_hov <- bind_rows(senegal_final, chad_final)

# Calculate monthly desert edge (NDVI ~ 0.2)
edge_lats <- combined_hov %>%
  # We group by Date instead of Year now to track the boundary shifting every single month
  filter(Mean_NDVI >= 0.18 & Mean_NDVI <= 0.22) %>%
  group_by(Date, Region, Frac_Year) %>%
  summarize(Edge_Lat = round(mean(Latitude_Slice, na.rm = TRUE), 1), .groups = "drop")

head(edge_lats)

# Create relative scale
master_hov_relative <- combined_hov %>%
  left_join(edge_lats, by = c("Date", "Region", "Frac_Year")) %>%
  mutate(Relative_Lat = round(Latitude_Slice - Edge_Lat, 1)) %>%
  filter(Relative_Lat >= -6 & Relative_Lat <= 2) %>%
  
  # Fill the gaps grouping by Date and Region
  group_by(Region, Date) %>%
  complete(Relative_Lat = seq(-6, 2, by = 0.1)) %>%
  mutate(Mean_NDVI = zoo::na.approx(Mean_NDVI, na.rm = FALSE)) %>%
  fill(Mean_NDVI, .direction = "downup") %>%
  ungroup()

head(master_hov_relative)

# Calculate lush edge (~0.45) tracking it across Date
lush_edge <- master_hov_relative %>%
  filter(Mean_NDVI >= 0.70 & Mean_NDVI <= 1) %>%
  group_by(Date, Region) %>%
  summarize(Lush_Lat = mean(Relative_Lat, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_relative <- ggplot(master_hov_relative, aes(x = Date, y = Relative_Lat)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = Mean_NDVI), width = 31, height = 0.1) + # Set width approx to 1 month (31 days)
  
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("#8c510a", "#f6e8c3", "#78c679", "#00441b"),
    oob = scales::squish,
    limits = c(0, 0.8),
    name = "Mean NDVI"
  ) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "red", linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  geom_smooth(data = lush_edge, aes(x = Date, y = Lush_Lat), 
              method = "loess", span = 0.1, se = FALSE, # Span lowered so it captures seasonal waves
              color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~Region) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-6, 2)) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Relative Seasonal Sahara Expansion: Chad vs. Senegal",
    subtitle = "Red Line = Desert Edge | Blue Dashed = Lush Vegetation Boundary",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Distance from Desert Border (°)"
  ) +
  
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "4 years", date_labels = "%Y", expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

p_relative

# Calculate long-term trend (Expansion over time)
expansion_stats <- edge_lats %>%
  group_by(Region) %>%
  summarize(
    # We use Frac_Year so the coefficient translates directly to degrees per YEAR (not days)
    Degrees_Per_Year = coef(lm(Edge_Lat ~ Frac_Year))[2],
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Miles_Per_Year = abs(Degrees_Per_Year * 69)
  )

print(expansion_stats)

```


```{r}

p_relative +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = as.Date(c("2000-01-01", "2007-01-01")))

p_hov_senegal +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = as.Date(c("2000-01-01", "2014-01-01"))) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "6 months", date_labels = "%Y/%m", expand = c(0, 0))

p_hov_senegal +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = as.Date(c("2014-07-01", "2026-01-01"))) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "6 months", date_labels = "%Y.%m", expand = c(0, 0))
  

```
